P

PlayedCardE - Class in battleship.view
PlayedCardE that is sent between players after each move, when on enemyCard played.
PlayedCardE(Cards, int) - Constructor for class battleship.view.PlayedCardE
Creates PlayedCardE instance.
PlayedCardIO - Class in battleship.view
PlayedCardIO that is sent between players after each move, when on ownCaard played.
PlayedCardIO(int, int) - Constructor for class battleship.view.PlayedCardIO
Creates PlayedCardE instance.
playedCards - Variable in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
 
playedCE - Variable in class battleship.view.PlayedCardE
 
playedOnType - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
playerName - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
port - Variable in class battleship.view.ClientServerThread
 
power - Variable in class battleship.model.Cards
 
printGameC(int, int) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
It is called from toString() method.
printGameCards() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
It is called from toString() method.
printHandCards() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
It is called from toString() method.
